meta.title: Veronika Belousova — Premium Web Developer
meta.description: Premium web developer based in Portugal. High-converting websites, performance, and results for businesses that value quality.

hero.name: Veronika Belousova
hero.title: Premium Web Developer
hero.tagline: I build websites and digital business tools that increase sales and strengthen trust in your business

about.label: About
about.trustTitle: A website as a trust instrument
trustParagraphs: Today almost anyone can launch a website. Building one that earns trust and brings clients is a completely different challenge.
My background is in journalism and marketing, so I know how to listen, ask precise questions, and sense what people really need.
In development I combine that with code—turning business ideas into clear, living interfaces where form, meaning, and ease of use work together.
about.edu2School: Can She Code Bootcamp · Montreal, Canada
certificateAlts: Certificate of completion — web development training (1)
Certificate of completion — web development training (2)
Certificate of completion — web development training (3)

items.title: Landing pages (high-converting)
items.detail: Single-page sites that guide people toward an action—leave a request, book an appointment, or buy. Thoughtful structure, strong copy, and logic that actually performs.

items.title: Corporate websites
items.detail: Sites that reflect your level, explain what you do, and build trust within seconds. Clean structure, intuitive navigation, and a polished presentation.

items.title: E-commerce websites
items.detail: Fast, easy-to-use stores where people can choose, purchase, and come back again. No clutter—only what helps the customer decide.

items.title: Website redesign
items.detail: I rework existing sites: remove noise, simplify structure, and bring the look up to date so the site starts delivering real results.

items.title: Custom development (React / JavaScript)
items.detail: Built from scratch for your goals—no templates, no platform limits. Clean code, flexibility, and room to implement ambitious ideas.

items.title: No templates or builders—just code
items.detail: Your site is built from scratch for your business: it runs faster, looks distinctive, and is not limited by what a platform allows.

items.title: A site that helps you capture leads
items.detail: The structure is designed so people quickly understand your offer and take the next step—message you, book, or buy.

items.title: Immersion in the business problem
items.detail: Before we start, I study your product and audience so the site does not simply “exist,” but actually performs.

items.title: Reliability and security
items.detail: Code-first sites are more stable, break less often, and are better protected against compromise.

items.title: Economical over the long run
items.detail: No unnecessary subscriptions or platform lock-in—the site is easier to maintain and less costly to run over time.

items.title: Clean, careful engineering
items.detail: Fast loading, stable behavior, and straightforward paths to evolve the product as the business grows.

items.title: Ease for the user
items.detail: Everything clear, logical, and where it belongs—that builds trust and increases the chance someone reaches out.

items.title: Ready for growth and promotion
items.detail: Built with future marketing in mind—so when you turn on ads, the site supports results instead of demanding a rebuild.

results.label: Value
results.heading: Results that compound
results.p1: I help businesses lift conversion and sales without increasing ad spend.
results.p2: Your website should not just look good — it should generate revenue.

projects.title: THE GOLDEN HORSE
projects.description: Dubai art gallery inspired by the grace and strength of horses — a refined digital space where legacy begins, emotion takes form, and living with art becomes a lifestyle.

projects.title: KITCHEN by true Taste
projects.description: Brunch café in Torres Vedras, Portugal — full site with menu, events, gallery, reviews, and WhatsApp reservations; warm editorial layout and strong food photography rhythm.

projects.title: Sudfinex
projects.description: Corporate site for an independent forensic accounting and financial expertise center in Russia — clear service architecture, trust-led content, and dense legal-grade information made scannable.

projects.title: Sharp & Spice
projects.description: Creative agency website with a bold, expressive identity and clear growth message — sharp ideas that go beyond the ordinary through strategy, visual language, and digital products that help brands stand out and inspire.

projects.title: s:stebler
projects.description: Multilingual website for a Swiss manufacturer of intelligent space solutions — product pillars, news, events, and showroom journeys with a precise architectural visual language. I contributed to the project as part of a collaborative team.

digitalTools.label: Digital tools
digitalTools.heading: Digital business tools
digitalTools.intro: Forms, client portals, and applications — real solutions I design, launch, and support for clients.

projects.title: Croatia digital nomad intake form
projects.description: A short online form: clients enter their details in Latin script and submit a request — so we can connect faster and start residence permit support.

projects.title: Emigrant Croatia Desk
projects.description: A client portal where clients see the current stage of their Croatian residence permit case. Includes a client area and an admin panel for the team.
highlights: Case stages and status in one place
Access granted by an Emigrant administrator
Client zone and panel for the support team

items.quote: Veronika built the site for our gallery, The Golden Horse, and from the first call it felt like she was inside the project with us — not just ticking boxes. She really got what we care about: art, horses, and the story we want to leave behind. The result is elegant, calm, and true to us. I’m genuinely happy to share the link with collectors and friends.
items.name: Daria Tretskova
items.role: Co-owner of the art gallery, Art manager, Art producer, horse rider

items.quote: Veronika quickly understood the specifics of our work — complex and trust-driven. The website turned out clear, structured, and highly professional. I especially appreciated her attention to detail and smooth communication throughout the project.
items.name: Elena Kashporova

items.quote: It was important for me to reflect the atmosphere of our café — style, taste, and mood. Veronika captured it perfectly. The website looks beautiful, is easy to use, and truly helps us get more bookings.
items.name: Oksana Golovanova
items.role: Chef & Founder, KITCHEN by True Taste

items.quote: As a creative agency, we have high standards — and Veronika delivered. Clean code, strong design, and a clear understanding of business needs. Working with her was both easy and professional.
items.name: Zlata Moroz
